description_long: This is a whole delicata zucchini, characterized by its elongated, cylindrical shape and slightly tapered ends. The skin is creamy white with prominent longitudinal orange and green stripes running from end to end, giving it a distinctive, variegated appearance. The surface is matte with a subtle sheen and appears firm but not hard, with shallow ridges and a few minor surface imperfections. One end features a short, woody stem, while the opposite end is rounded and smooth. The overall size suggests it is a medium to large specimen, typical of delicata squash varieties. The coloration and texture are consistent with a fresh, uncut vegetable, likely harvested recently.
description: A whole delicata zucchini with creamy white skin and orange-green stripes, featuring a short stem and a firm, ridged surface.
description_view_0: The zucchini is shown with its stem visible on the right, highlighting the creamy skin and orange stripes along the top.
description_view_1: This view shows the stem on the left and emphasizes the smooth, slightly curved body with green and orange striping.
description_view_2: The rounded end is prominent, with green and orange stripes more visible along the length of the zucchini.
description_view_3: The opposite end from the stem is in focus, showing a concentration of green striping and a smooth, rounded tip.
attribute_orientation: lying horizontally with stem on the left and rounded end on the right
attribute_visible_markings: longitudinal orange and green stripes, minor surface blemishes
